definition:
1. to carry round along with  or together , (Plato Philosophus) 
2. Pass. to be carried round together , (Plato Philosophus) 
3. συμπεριφέρεσθαί τινι to have intercourse with  one, (Polybius Historicus): to adapt oneself to  circumstances, with dative, (Aeschines Orator) 
4. to be well acquainted with  things, (Polybius Historicus) (ML)
